reviews.text: The morning bun is still the single best pastry in San Francisco. Line moved fast on a Tuesday morning and staff were lovely.
Great bread, genuinely world class, but the line was 40 minutes and there is nowhere to sit. Get it to go and walk to Dolores Park.
Croissant was perfectly laminated and the coffee was solid. Docking a star because they were out of the country bread by 10am.
